productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max Black Shoe
description: Blending the Classic nike running shoe with a simplistic design and maximum cushioning, the nike Air Max LTE is an ideal shoe for neutral runners. Weighing just about 340 grams, the Nike Air Max LTE brings out your athletic side when your on the run.Upper Mesh upper promotes a comfortably breathable environment Synthetic leather overlays supply lightweight, targeted support Lightly padded tongue and collar for added comfort Midsole Phylon forefoot provides lightweight cushioning for a smooth ride Visible Max Air heel unit delivers maximum cushioning Polyurethane heel casing for enhanced support Full inner sleeve offers seamless, irritation-free wear Outsole Solid rubber forefoot supplies durable grip BRS 1000 rubber in heel provides long-lasting wear Forefoot flex grooves allow for a more natural, fluid foot motion Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
